Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class ProofTree

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.ProofTree
All Implemented Interfaces:
IProofTree
public final class ProofTree extends Object implements IProofTree
Implementation of a proof tree, with observer design pattern.

    Description

    deltaProcessor
    The delta processor for this tree

    origin

    root
    The root Proof Tree Node

    Description

    Creates a new proof tree for the given sequent.

    Creates a new proof tree for the given (disconnected) IProofTreeNode.

  • Field Details

    • deltaProcessor

      final DeltaProcessor deltaProcessor
      The delta processor for this tree

    • origin

      final Object origin
      The origin of the root sequent

    • root

      final ProofTreeNode root
      The root Proof Tree Node

  • Constructor Details

    • ProofTree

      public ProofTree(IProverSequent sequent, Object origin)
      Creates a new proof tree for the given sequent. Clients must not call this constructor, but rather the factory method in SequentProver.

    • ProofTree

      protected ProofTree(ProofTreeNode node)
      Creates a new proof tree for the given (disconnected) IProofTreeNode. Clients must not call this constructor, but rather the factory method in SequentProver.

  • Method Details

    • addChangeListener

      public void addChangeListener(IProofTreeChangedListener listener)
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Adds the given listener for changes to this proof tree. Has no effect if an identical listener is already registered.

      This listener will be notified when a change is applied to this tree.

      Specified by:
      addChangeListener in interface IProofTree
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to register
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeChangedListener

    • getOrigin

      public Object getOrigin()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns the origin of the root node of this proof tree.
      Specified by:
      getOrigin in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      the origin of this proof tree, might be null

    • getRoot

      public ProofTreeNode getRoot()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns the root node of this proof tree.
      Specified by:
      getRoot in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      the root node of this proof tree

    • getFormulaFactory

      public FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns the language of this proof tree in the form of a formula factory.

      This is a shortcut for getRoot().getFormulaFactory().

      Specified by:
      getFormulaFactory in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      the formula factory of this proof tree

    • getSequent

      public IProverSequent getSequent()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns the sequent that this proof tree attempts to prove.

      This is a shortcut for getRoot().getSequent().

      Specified by:
      getSequent in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      the sequent of this proof tree

    • isClosed

      public boolean isClosed()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns whether or not this proof tree is closed.

      This is a shortcut for getConfidence() > IConfidence.PENDING.

      Specified by:
      isClosed in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      true iff this proof tree is closed

    • removeChangeListener

      public void removeChangeListener(IProofTreeChangedListener listener)
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Removes the given listener for changes to this proof tree. Has no effect if this listener is not registered.

      This listener will be notified anymore when a change is applied to this tree.

      Specified by:
      removeChangeListener in interface IProofTree
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to unregister
      See Also:
      • IProofTreeChangedListener

    • run

      public void run(Runnable op)
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Run a batch operation as an atomic operation. There will be only one delta sent after the modification of the proof tree.

      Specified by:
      run in interface IProofTree
      Parameters:
      op - a Runnable

    • getConfidence

      public int getConfidence()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns the confidence of this proof tree.

      A proof tree is considered unattempted if its root is open and is not commented. Otherwise, it is the confidence of the root proof tree node.

      Specified by:
      getConfidence in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      the confidence of this proof tree (see IConfidence)

    • proofAttempted

      public boolean proofAttempted()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns whether or not a proof has been attempted.

      A proof is said to be attempted iff the root node of the proof tree is not open.

      Specified by:
      proofAttempted in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      true iff a proof has been attempted.

    • getProofDependencies

      public IProofDependencies getProofDependencies()
      Description copied from interface: IProofTree
      Returns the dependency information for this proof tree. (see IProofDependencies)

      Note that dependencies may change after proof tree modification. To get accurate information this method needs to be re-called after any modification of the proof tree.

      Specified by:
      getProofDependencies in interface IProofTree
      Returns:
      the dependency information for this proof tree.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
